---
title: "project_1_3_VSZ"
author: "Szabó Viktor"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load data

```{r}
fileList<-c(1:18)
for (year in 2001:2018) {
  fileList[year-2000] <- paste0("VDS2526_Madrid/madrid_", year, ".csv")
}
all_data <- Map(read.csv, fileList)
all_data <- plyr::rbind.fill(all_data)
all_data$date <- as.Date(all_data$date)
head(all_data)
```

# 1

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)

yearly <- all_data %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(format(as.Date(date), "%Y"))) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop")

ug_long <- yearly %>%
  select(year, NO, NO_2, NOx, O_3, SO_2, PM10, PM25, OXY) %>%
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "pollutant", values_to = "concentration") %>%
  filter(!is.na(concentration),!is.na(pollutant))

ug_order <- ug_long %>%
  group_by(pollutant) %>%
  filter(year == max(year)) %>%
  arrange(desc(concentration)) %>%
  pull(pollutant)
ug_long$pollutant <- factor(ug_long$pollutant, levels = ug_order)

mg_long <- yearly %>%
  select(year, CO, TCH, CH4, BEN, EBE, MXY, PXY, TOL, NMHC) %>%
  pivot_longer(-year, names_to = "pollutant", values_to = "concentration") %>%
  filter(!is.na(concentration),!is.na(pollutant))

mg_order <- mg_long %>%
  group_by(pollutant) %>%
  filter(year == max(year)) %>%
  arrange(desc(concentration)) %>%
  pull(pollutant)
mg_long$pollutant <- factor(mg_long$pollutant, levels = mg_order)

p1 <- ggplot(ug_long, aes(x = year, y = concentration, colour = pollutant)) +
  geom_line() + geom_point() +
  labs(x = "year", y = "Concentration (µg/m³)", colour = NULL) +
  theme_classic()

p2 <- ggplot(mg_long, aes(x = year, y = concentration, colour = pollutant)) +
  geom_line() + geom_point() +
  labs(x = "year", y = "Concentration (mg/m³)", colour = NULL) +
  theme_classic()

combined <- p1 + p2
combined
ggsave("pollution_plots.png", combined, width = 14, height = 5)
```

# 3a

```{r}
ug_long <- ug_long %>%
  group_by(pollutant) %>%
  mutate(concentration_change = concentration / concentration[year == min(year)] * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

mg_long <- mg_long %>%
  group_by(pollutant) %>%
  mutate(concentration_change = concentration / concentration[year == min(year)] * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

ug_order <- ug_long %>%
  group_by(pollutant) %>%
  filter(year == max(year)) %>%
  arrange(desc(concentration_change)) %>%
  pull(pollutant)
ug_long$pollutant <- factor(ug_long$pollutant, levels = ug_order)

mg_order <- mg_long %>%
  group_by(pollutant) %>%
  filter(year == max(year)) %>%
  arrange(desc(concentration_change)) %>%
  pull(pollutant)
mg_long$pollutant <- factor(mg_long$pollutant, levels = mg_order)

p1 <- ggplot(ug_long, aes(x = year, y = concentration_change, colour = pollutant)) +
  geom_line() + geom_point() +
  labs(x = "year", y = "Concentration (µg/m³)", colour = NULL) +
  theme_classic()

p2 <- ggplot(mg_long, aes(x = year, y = concentration_change, colour = pollutant)) +
  geom_line() + geom_point() +
  labs(x = "year", y = "Concentration (mg/m³)", colour = NULL) +
  theme_classic()

combined <- p1 + p2
combined
ggsave("pollution_change_plots.png", combined, width = 14, height = 5)
```

# 3b

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

cor_matrix <- all_data %>%
  select(BEN, CO, EBE, MXY, NMHC, NO_2, NOx, OXY, O_3, PM10, PXY, SO_2, TCH, TOL, PM25, NO, CH4) %>%
  cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))
cor_long <- cor_long[as.integer(cor_long$Var1) < as.integer(cor_long$Var2), ]

corplot <- ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Var2, y = Var1, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev) + theme_classic()

corplot
ggsave("Correlation_plot.png", corplot)
```
